License & Permit Bonds

Your Complete Resource for License, Permit & Commercial Compliance Bonds

License and permit bonds are required by state agencies to ensure businesses operate ethically, follow regulations, and protect consumers from financial harm. This hub organizes all your license-related bond content into one authoritative, easy-to-navigate resource.

On This Page
What Are License & Permit Bonds? Core Bond Types License & Permit Bond Guides State-Specific Pages Educational Resources Tools & Checklists
Overview

What Are License & Permit Bonds?

License and permit bonds are financial guarantees required as part of a business's licensing process. They ensure:

1
Compliance with state and local regulations
2
Ethical business practices
3
Protection of consumers and the public
4
Payment of taxes, fees, and penalties
5
Financial accountability

These bonds apply across dozens of industries — from auto dealers to money transmitters to private schools.

Core Bond Types

Core Types of License & Permit Bonds

The most common bonds businesses need to get licensed and stay compliant.

🚗

Auto Dealer Bonds

Required for new and used motor vehicle dealers to ensure ethical sales practices.

🏦

Mortgage Broker Bonds

Guarantee compliance with lending laws and consumer protection regulations.

📋

Insurance Adjuster Bonds

Required for adjusters to ensure honest claims handling.

💼

Employment Agency Bonds

Protect job seekers from fraudulent or unethical agency practices.

💰

Money Transmitter Bonds

Guarantee compliance with financial reporting and consumer protection laws.

🚛

Freight Broker Bonds (BMC-84)

Required by the FMCSA to ensure payment to carriers and shippers.

⚡

Utility Deposit Bonds

Allow businesses to avoid large cash deposits with utility providers.

🎓

School Bonds

Required for private schools, trade schools, and vocational programs.

🏋️

Health Club Bonds

Protect consumers in case a gym closes or fails to honor contracts.

🍷

Liquor License Bonds

Ensure compliance with alcohol tax and regulatory requirements.

📞

Collection Agency Bonds

Guarantee ethical debt collection practices.

📄

Certificate of Title Bonds

Used when a vehicle title is missing or defective.

🔨

Auctioneer Bonds

Required for auctioneers to ensure proper handling of funds.

📦

Distributor & Wholesale Bonds

Guarantee compliance with distribution, tax, and licensing rules.

Why It Matters

Why Businesses Need License & Permit Bonds

License and permit bonds help businesses:

1
Meet state licensing requirements
2
Build trust with customers
3
Avoid penalties and license suspension
4
Demonstrate financial responsibility
5
Operate legally and ethically
